Bart Verbruggen.note: Netherlands' modern goalkeeper, comfortable starting attacks and reacting quickly when the line is high.
Bart Verbruggen.noteZh: 巴尔特·费布吕亨是荷兰现代型门将，能舒服地发起进攻，也能在防线前压时快速反应。

Brian Brobbey.note: Netherlands' power striker option, useful for pinning centre-backs and turning scrappy service into shots.
Brian Brobbey.noteZh: 布赖恩·布罗贝是荷兰力量型中锋选择，能压住中卫并把零散传球转化为射门。

Cody Gakpo.note: Netherlands' left-side scoring threat, dangerous when he drives inside or appears late at the far post.
Cody Gakpo.noteZh: 科迪·加克波是荷兰左路进球威胁，内切推进或后点后插上时很危险。

Crysencio Summerville.note: Netherlands' isolation winger, able to beat a full-back and turn the byline into cutbacks.
Crysencio Summerville.noteZh: 克里森西奥·萨默维尔是荷兰一对一边锋，能突破边后卫并把底线位置变成倒三角传球。

Denzel Dumfries.note: Netherlands' right-side power runner, famous for arriving at the back post like an extra forward.
Denzel Dumfries.noteZh: 丹泽尔·邓弗里斯是荷兰右路力量型跑动点，以像额外前锋一样冲到后点著称。

Donyell Malen.note: Netherlands' direct forward runner, useful for attacking space and finishing before defenders reset.
Donyell Malen.noteZh: 多尼尔·马伦是荷兰直接型前场跑动点，适合冲击空间并在防守重整前完成终结。

Frenkie de Jong.note: Netherlands' tempo setter, able to carry through pressure and make possession feel calmer.
Frenkie de Jong.noteZh: 弗朗基·德容是荷兰节奏设定者，能带球穿过压力并让控球变得更冷静。

Guus Til.note: Netherlands' box-arriving midfielder, valuable when they need a runner beyond the striker.
Guus Til.noteZh: 古斯·蒂尔是荷兰后插上进入禁区的中场，球队需要有人越过中锋冲击时很有价值。

Jan Paul van Hecke.note: Netherlands' front-foot centre-back, comfortable stepping out to win duels and pass forward.
Jan Paul van Hecke.noteZh: 扬·保罗·范赫克是荷兰主动型中卫，能前顶赢下对抗并向前传球。

Jorrel Hato.note: Netherlands' young left-sided defender, giving them calm build-up from centre-back or full-back zones.
Jorrel Hato.noteZh: 约雷尔·哈托是荷兰年轻的左侧防守者，能从中卫或边后卫区域冷静出球。

Justin Kluivert.note: Netherlands' sharp attacking connector, useful for driving inside and supporting the striker near goal.
Justin Kluivert.noteZh: 贾斯廷·克鲁伊维特是荷兰锐利的进攻连接点，适合内切推进并在门前支援中锋。

Lutsharel Geertruida.note: Netherlands' defensive hybrid, able to cover right-back, centre-back, or midfield protection.
Lutsharel Geertruida.noteZh: 卢特沙雷尔·海特勒伊达是荷兰防守混合型球员，能覆盖右后卫、中卫或中场保护。

Mark Flekken.note: Netherlands' experienced goalkeeper option, bringing distribution range and calm penalty-area command.
Mark Flekken.noteZh: 马克·弗莱肯是荷兰经验型门将选择，带来传球范围和冷静的禁区指挥。

Marten de Roon.note: Netherlands' pragmatic midfield screen, useful for closing counters and protecting attacking full-backs.
Marten de Roon.noteZh: 马滕·德容是荷兰务实的中场屏障，适合封住反击并保护前插的边后卫。

Mats Wieffer.note: Netherlands' midfield balance option, helping clean up second balls and keep possession moving.
Mats Wieffer.noteZh: 马茨·维弗是荷兰中场平衡选择，能清理第二落点并让控球继续流动。

Memphis Depay.note: Netherlands' creative forward, still dangerous when he drops off, combines, or shapes a restart.
Memphis Depay.noteZh: 孟菲斯·德佩是荷兰创造型前锋，回撤配合或处理定位球时依然很危险。

Micky van de Ven.note: Netherlands' recovery-speed defender, built to erase space behind a high line.
Micky van de Ven.noteZh: 米基·范德文是荷兰回追速度型后卫，适合抹掉高位防线身后的空间。

Nathan Ake.note: Netherlands' left-footed defensive stabilizer, comfortable covering centre-back or left-back roles.
Nathan Ake.noteZh: 内森·阿克是荷兰左脚防守稳定点，能舒服地覆盖中卫或左后卫职责。

Noa Lang.note: Netherlands' rhythm-changing winger, capable of adding flair and hesitation moves from the left.
Noa Lang.noteZh: 诺阿·朗是荷兰改变节奏的边锋，能从左路带来灵感和节奏停顿动作。

Quinten Timber.note: Netherlands' energetic midfield carrier, useful for driving through contact and joining attacks.
Quinten Timber.noteZh: 昆滕·廷伯是荷兰充满能量的中场推进者，适合带球穿过对抗并参与进攻。

Robin Roefs.note: Netherlands' high-upside goalkeeper depth, bringing reflexes and bravery in crowded areas.
Robin Roefs.noteZh: 罗宾·鲁夫斯是荷兰上限很高的门将深度，能在拥挤区域带来反应和勇气。

Ryan Gravenberch.note: Netherlands' powerful midfield carrier, able to stride out of pressure and tilt the field forward.
Ryan Gravenberch.noteZh: 赖恩·赫拉芬贝赫是荷兰力量型中场推进者，能大步摆脱压力并把场面推向前方。

Teun Koopmeiners.note: Netherlands' left-footed midfield passer, useful for switches, restarts, and shooting from the edge.
Teun Koopmeiners.noteZh: 特恩·库普梅纳斯是荷兰左脚中场传球手，适合转移球、定位球和禁区弧顶射门。

Tijjani Reijnders.note: Netherlands' gliding box-to-box midfielder, able to accelerate possession and arrive for shots.
Tijjani Reijnders.noteZh: 蒂贾尼·赖因德斯是荷兰流畅的双向中场，能加速控球并后插上射门。

Virgil van Dijk.note: Netherlands' defensive captain, still the voice and aerial anchor of the back line.
Virgil van Dijk.noteZh: 维吉尔·范戴克是荷兰防守队长，仍然是防线声音和空中支柱。

Wout Weghorst.note: Netherlands' late-game target, useful for direct balls, aerial pressure, and turning matches messy.
Wout Weghorst.noteZh: 沃特·韦霍斯特是荷兰比赛后段的支点，适合直接球、空中压力和把比赛搅乱。
